location: Purchased for 600 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant who sits under a collapsed stone structure southeast of the Coastal Cave entrance, in West Limgrave. Also the default starting weapon for the Wretch class, and a rare 2% drop from club-wielding Demi-Humans.

source.name: Nomadic Merchant (West Limgrave, SE of Coastal Cave)

tactics: Buying it for 600 Runes is far more reliable than farming the 2% Demi-Human drop.
The merchant is tucked beneath a collapsed structure and easy to walk past — look southeast of the Coastal Cave entrance, west of Church of Elleh.
Starting as a Wretch skips the trip entirely — you spawn with one equipped.
lore: A plain length of solid wood, no different from a caveman's cudgel — no craftsmanship involved, just brute force and persistence needed to beat something down with it.

builds.name: Pure Strength Bonk
builds.why: C-scaling Strength and no Dexterity requirement make it a zero-investment early heavy-attack weapon; its Barbaric Roar skill buffs damage and poise for a few seconds.
